subject: [POLICY] Update CLAMP OOM Configuration for Remove Clamp frontend
commit_message:
[POLICY] Update CLAMP OOM Configuration for Remove Clamp frontend

Remove clamp-frontend code,
as this is moved to policy-gui

Issue-ID: POLICY-3358
Change-Id: Id6402815ead572e8cec9f1743709d6de6f28b79c
Signed-off-by: FrancescoFioraEst <francesco.fiora@est.tech>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4697/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/4697/ )
